name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Indianapolis First Cash Pawn at 5620 W Washington provides pawn loans, valuations, and quick cash.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn at 5620 W Washington Street is a standalone pawn shop serving Indianapolis residents on the west side of the city. This Indianapolis location is conveniently situated for customers throughout the area, offering a full range of pawn services in a professional setting.

The 5620 W Washington Street location in Indianapolis, IN specializes in providing fast cash loans, buying valuables, and pawning items of value. Call 317-487-7450 to discuss what items you can bring in or to get a quick quote on your valuables.

Indianapolis pawn customers typically visit to get quick cash loans against jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, or collectibles. Bring a valid photo ID and the item you want to pawn or sell. First Cash Pawn is here to provide fast, fair evaluations.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 3,300+ retail locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America for maximum accessibility
Immediate cash on spot with no credit checks required for pawn loans
Non-recourse loan structure means borrower has no deficiency liability if merchandise is forfeited
Diverse merchandise buying: jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments, and more
Integrated retail sales model allows customers to shop wide inventory selection while accessing loans
Publicly traded with S&P 500 and Russell 2000 index inclusion provides institutional stability
Layaway service option with affordable 10% down payment for purchase flexibility
cons: Pawn loans carry high effective interest rates compared to traditional bank lending options
Requires personal property collateral—borrowers risk losing valuable items if unable to repay
Non-recourse loans mean forfeited merchandise is sold, limiting retrieval options
Pawn loan amounts are typically small and based on merchandise resale value rather than creditworthiness
Retail merchandise inventory and pricing fluctuates by location, creating inconsistent product availability
best_for: Consumers with immediate urgent cash needs and no access to traditional bank credit
People seeking to convert unused personal property (jewelry, electronics, instruments) into quick cash
Shoppers hunting for discounted merchandise and second-hand goods across diverse product categories
Individuals without established credit history or those unable to qualify for conventional loans
diagnosis: FirstCash is best suited for individuals facing immediate cash emergencies who own valuable personal property and lack access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn loans carry high effective costs and involve forfeiture risk of collateral items if loans cannot be repaid within the loan term.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property with non-recourse terms
Retail buying and selling of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying with immediate cash payment
Layaway purchase plans with 10% down payment option
In-store merchandise inventory shopping across 3,300+ locations
Point-of-sale payment solutions through wholly owned subsidiary AFF
Lease-to-own financing through 15,000+ nationwide retail merchant partner locations
Store locator service to find nearest FirstCash location
Online inventory browsing and information access
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 5620 W Washington, Indianapolis, IN. Quick cash loans on jewelry and electronics.
